title: Same Data, Two Traversal Orders
prompt:
Fill a 4x4 int matrix where matrix[i][j] = i*4 + j (so values 0 through 15). Sum every element two ways: once traversing row-major (i outer loop, j inner loop) into row_sum, once traversing column-major (j outer loop, i inner loop) into col_sum. Print exactly:
Row sum: 120
Col sum: 120
(both sums are the same value, computed the same way, just in a different order - that's the point).
